problems.title: 单列升序排序
problems.description: 查询 students 表，按年龄从小到大排序。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT, gender VARCHAR(10))

problems.requirement: 使用 ORDER BY age ASC 或 ORDER BY age。
problems.answer: SELECT * FROM students ORDER BY age ASC;
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否按年龄升序排序

problems.title: 单列降序排序
problems.description: 查询 students 表，按年龄从大到小排序。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT, gender VARCHAR(10))

problems.requirement: 使用 ORDER BY age DESC。
problems.answer: SELECT * FROM students ORDER BY age DESC;
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否按年龄降序排序

problems.title: 多列排序
problems.description: 查询 students 表，先按性别排序，再按年龄降序排序。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT, gender VARCHAR(10))

problems.requirement: 使用 ORDER BY gender, age DESC。
problems.answer: SELECT * FROM students ORDER BY gender, age DESC;
problems.expectedResult: 先按性别排序，再按年龄降序

problems.title: 限制返回行数
problems.description: 查询 students 表，只返回前3条记录。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT, gender VARCHAR(10))

problems.judgeRule: 检查是否只返回了3条记录

problems.title: 分页查询
problems.description: 查询 students 表，每页2条记录，查询第2页的数据。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT, gender VARCHAR(10))

problems.judgeRule: 检查是否返回了正确的分页数据

problems.title: 查询前三名
problems.description: 查询 students 表，按年龄从大到小排序，返回年龄最大的3个学生。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT, gender VARCHAR(10))

problems.requirement: 结合 ORDER BY 和 LIMIT。
problems.answer: SELECT * FROM students ORDER BY age DESC LIMIT 3;
problems.expectedResult: 返回年龄最大的3个学生
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否返回了正确的学生

problems.title: 查询第N名
problems.description: 查询 students 表，按年龄从小到大排序，返回第2个学生。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT, gender VARCHAR(10))

problems.answer: SELECT * FROM students ORDER BY age LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1;
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否返回了第2个学生

problems.title: 按多个字段排序
problems.description: 查询 students 表，先按性别降序排序，再按年龄升序排序，最后按姓名排序。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT, gender VARCHAR(10))

problems.requirement: 使用 ORDER BY gender DESC, age, name。
problems.answer: SELECT * FROM students ORDER BY gender DESC, age, name;

problems.title: 排序后去重
problems.description: 查询 students 表中所有不重复的性别，并按性别排序。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT, gender VARCHAR(10))

problems.requirement: 结合 DISTINCT 和 ORDER BY。
problems.answer: SELECT DISTINCT gender FROM students ORDER BY gender;
problems.expectedResult: 返回去重并排序后的性别

problems.title: 复杂分页查询
problems.description: 查询 students 表中性别为'男'的学生，按年龄降序排序，每页2条记录，查询第2页的数据。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT, gender VARCHAR(10))

problems.requirement: 结合 WHERE、ORDER BY 和 LIMIT OFFSET。
problems.answer: SELECT * FROM students WHERE gender = '男' ORDER BY age DESC LIMIT 2 OFFSET 2;
problems.expectedResult: 返回符合条件的第2页数据
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否返回了正确的数据
